title: Perry comes through training before T20 World Cup final | Cricket News
description: Australia all-rounder Ellyse Perry appears on track to be fit for Sunday's T20 World Cup final against England.

blocks.text: Cricket update: Perry comes through training before T20 World Cup final. Australia all-rounder Ellyse Perry appears on track to be fit for Sunday's T20 World Cup final against England.
